# Josue Navarro - CTO Portfolio

## Profile
- Name: Josue Navarro
- Role: Chief Technology Officer
- Location: Greater Madrid Metropolitan Area
- Focus: Technology strategy, scalable systems, cloud architecture, AI-driven architecture
- Languages: Spanish (native or bilingual), English (professional working)

## Current Position
- CTO at Rasmia Alianza Tecnologica S.L. (Mar 2026-present)

## Expertise
- Technology leadership and architecture governance
- Domain-Driven Design and Clean Architecture
- Cloud strategy and platform standardization (AWS/GCP)
- CI/CD modernization and delivery performance
- Event-driven and distributed systems
- Practical AI integration for software platforms

## Certifications
- ChatGPT Prompt Engineering for Developers
- Introduction to Generative AI
- Building Systems with the ChatGPT API
- Speexx English CEFR Level B2.2
